products.features:
* Omnidirectional sound pickup
* up to 100 m operational range
* Type-C charging port 
* 360 degree rotating back clip
* Up to 9-hour TX’s runtime
* Mute function
* Automatic pairing
* High-performance noise reduction
* Plug and play
products.specs:
Transmission Type: 2.4GHz
Poplar Pattern: Omnidirectional
Frequency Response: 20Hz-16kHZ
Signal-to-noise Ratio: >80dB
Latency: 25ms
Sensitivity: -42dB
Operating Range: 100m (without obstacles)
RF Output Power: 10dBm
Charging Port: USB-C
Transmitter's Battery Capacity: 95mAh
Transmitter's Charaing Time: Approx. 2 hours
Transmitter's Battery Life: Approx. 9 hours
Receiver's Power Requirement: Supplied by External Devices

products.features:
* Supports up to 4 mics simultaneously; Automatic pairing for plug-and-play
* Dual noise cancellation: BOYA Audio's one-click intelligent noise cancellation tech and windshield for clear sound capture in noisy environments.
* The TX features a rotating clip and a omnidirectional diaphragm, enabling sound pickup at 360°
* SNR 80dB and 48K/16bit recording for better-than-CD audio recording. 120dB SPL for avoiding distortion and clipping
* Up to 200m transmission range in open space
* Support speaker play when Receiver plugged & charing while using
* Portable charging case with battery life of up to 18 hours for the versions

products.features:
1. Support True Al noise cancellation, up to 40 dB.
2.Ultra-mini design and super lightweight, TX weighs only 7g.
3. With 2TX (Transmitter) & 4RX (Receiver) connection, which supports up to 8 devices recording simultaneously.
4. Automatic Gain Control & limiter for distortion-free audio
5. Supporting monitoring on Receiver
products.specs:
Transmission Type:2.4 GHz digital frequency
Transmission Range: Up to 300 m (without obstacles)
Polar Pattern: Omnidirectional
Distortion: ≤0.1%
Frequency Response: 20 Hz to 20 kHz
Sensitivity: -32 dB
Reference Audio lnputLevel: -20 to -42 dBu (MICinput, 0 dB Gain)
Sampling Rate:48 kHz
Bit Rate: 24 bit
Signal-to-noise Ratio: >85 dB
Audio input:Built-in condenser microphone capsule
Power Supply: Built-in Li-ion battery
Battery Capacity of TX: 130 mAh
Battery Life of TX:Approx. 6 hours
Charging Time of TX:Approx. 1.5 hours
Weight: 7g
Dimensions:Ф26.1x10 mm (Ф x H)excluding magnet andmagnetic clip
Audio Output of RX:Lightning or USB-C digital output
Battery Capacity of RX:240 mAh
Weight of RX:16.5 g
Dimensions of RX:44.2 x20.79x22 mm (LxWx H)
Battery Type of Charging case: Built-in Li-ion battery
Battery Capacity of CC:1500 mAh
Power supply of CC:USB-C port
Charging Time of CC:Approx. 2 hours (5 V 2A)
Charging Cycles of CC:More than 1.5 times(2*TX)
Weight of CC:108.5 g
Dimensions of CC:108x42x42mm(LxW xH)

products.features:
1. 4 forms in 1: clip-on, handheld, desktop, or on-camera.
2. True Al noise cancellation suppresses up to 40 dB.
3. TX only 7 g and 13 mm thin for discreet wear.
4. With limiter and safety track prevent clipping. 
5. Single TX with 6 hrs of battery life per mic, with charing case support 30 hrs in total.

products.connector: Type-C Adapter + 3.5mm TRS Cable (W/ 2 Lavalier Mic)
products.features:
1. Support True Al noise cancellation, up to 40 dB.
2. With 90 dB SNR for studio-quality sound.
3. With 2TX(Transmitter) & 4RX (Receiver) connection, which supports up to 8 devices recording simultaneously.
4. With 32-bit float onboard REC with 8 GB storage on each TX.
5. Automatic Gain Control & limiter for distortion-free audio
6. Upgraded 1.1-inch AMOLED touch screen + gesture-adapted knob button
products.specs:
Operating Frequency: 2.4 GHz digital frequency
Modulation: GFSK
MaximumTransmission Range: Up to 300 m (without obstacles); 60 m (with obstacles)
Microphone Directions: Omnidirectional
Distortion: ≤0.1%
Frequency Response: 20 Hz to 20 kHz
Sensitivity: ≥-32 dB
Reference Audio inputLevel: -20 to -42 dBu (MIC input, 0 dB Gain)
Sampling Rate: 48 kHz
Bit Rate: 24/32-bit
Signal-to-noise Ratio: ≥90 dB
Audio Input: Built-in condenser microphone capsule
Max SPL: 120 dBSPL
Storage: 8GB
Port for Reading Audio Files: USB-C Port
Power supply: Built-in Li-ion battery
Battery Life OF TX: ≤9 hours (with Noise Cancellation and Onboard Recordingoff); 6 hours (with Noise Cancellation and OnboardRecording on)
Charging Time of TX: 1.75 hours
Weight of TX: 20.5 g
Dimensions of TX: 40x25.4 x 19.76 mm (L xW x H), including magnetic clip

Battery Life of RX: 15 hours( 2*TX+1*RX)
Charging Time of RX: Approx. 2 hours
Weight of RX:
29.5 g (excluding the adapter 2 g)

Battery Capacity of Charing case: 2900 mAh
Power Supply of CC:USB-C port
Charging Time of CC:Approx. 2.5 hours (5 V 2.5A)
Charging Cycles of CC:More than 2 times (2*TX)
Weight of CC:176 g
Dimensions of CC:112x45.5x57.6 mm(LxWxH)
